title: Trackwork Refabricated
description: Wheels and Tracks to drive around your world! [Unofficial Fabric Port]
body:
### This is an unofficial port!
**If you get any issues with this port, please don't annoy Endal; [create a new issue here](https://github.com/zvikasdongre/trackwork-fabric/issues) instead. :)**

I have asked and received permission to upload the port on Modrinth and Curseforge.

**Checkout the official [Trackwork Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/trackwork) by [Endalion](https://modrinth.com/user/Endalion)**

---

Trackwork is an addon for Valkyrien Skies 2 and Create Mod, adding tank treads to traverse rough terrain in minecraft! Also, WHEELS!!!!

Build your own vehicle and travel the world in style, race your friends or have a tank battle, with Trackwork it just works™. Be sure to read the Ponders or you will find yourself at the local repair shop real soon!

---

### Full credit goes to [Endalion](https://github.com/Endalion) for making Trackwork!
